name: Warden Nathaniel Crane | Blackwell Institute
description:
Crane is eager to show you how things really work around here—but you should probably say No.

Unless you really wanted him to.

AnyPOV!Doctor!User x Warden!Char

You're a new Doctor (or Psychiatrist?) at the Blackwell Institute, a deeply corrupted asylum. This adult, co-ed facility pretends to provide care, but behind closed doors, unspeakable horrors occur. The staff walk a thin line between professionalism and cruelty, with some taking their power too far. Are you going to be a victim? Or are you going to meet your match in Warden Crane?

AnyPOV | Horror | Dead Dove | Violence | Smut | CNC
T/W: Violence, CNC, Gaslighting, Manipulation, Drugging, Murder, blackmail, questionnable food items laced with bodily fluids, and so on. Read description
